failedAssertions.reason: Assertion specification requires either cascading (children become roots) or error rejection when releasing a tension with children. Current implementation does neither - it leaves children with stale parent references.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Feature not implemented. The validation contract specifies mutations_between(start, end) but this function does not exist in the codebase.
Feature not implemented. The contract asserts that replaying mutations should reproduce current tension state, but no reconstruction utility exists.
No automated test exists for directory tree walking. Implementation verified via source code inspection at store.rs:141-160.
No automated test exists for global fallback. Implementation verified via source code inspection at store.rs:157-159.
No automated test exists for permission denied or disk full scenarios. Error types implemented and display correctly. Full verification would require controlled filesystem permissions.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: rust-library-api section with isolation and boundary rules for parallel flow validators.
